Program
  ProgramHead
    PROGRAM: program
    ID: proctest
  DeclarePart
    VarDecPart
      VarDec
        VAR: var
        VarDecList
          TypeDef
            BaseType
              INTEGER: integer
          VarIDList
            ID: a
            VarIDMore
              ,: ,
              VarIDList
                ID: b
                VarIDMore
                  ,: ,
                  VarIDList
                    ID: result
          ;: ;
    ProcDecpart
      ProcDec
        PROCEDURE: procedure
        ID: add
        (: (
        ParamList
          ParamDecList
            Param
              TypeDef
                BaseType
                  INTEGER: integer
              FormList
                ID: x
                FidMore
                  ,: ,
                  FormList
                    ID: y
            ParamMore
              ;: ;
              ParamDecList
                Param
                  VAR: var
                  TypeDef
                    BaseType
                      INTEGER: integer
                  FormList
                    ID: z
        ): )
        ;: ;
        DeclarePart
        ProcBody
          ProgramBody
            BEGIN: begin
            StmList
              Stm
                ID: z
                AssignmentRest
                  :=: :=
                  Exp
                    Term
                      Factor
                        Variable
                          ID: x
                    OtherTerm
                      AddOp
                        +: +
                      Exp
                        Term
                          Factor
                            Variable
                              ID: y
            END: end
  ProgramBody
    BEGIN: begin
    StmList
      Stm
        InputStm
          READ: read
          (: (
          ID: a
          ): )
      StmMore
        ;: ;
        StmList
          Stm
            InputStm
              READ: read
              (: (
              ID: b
              ): )
          StmMore
            ;: ;
            StmList
              Stm
                ID: add
                CallStmRest
                  (: (
                  ActParamList
                    Exp
                      Term
                        Factor
                          Variable
                            ID: a
                    ActParamMore
                      ,: ,
                      ActParamList
                        Exp
                          Term
                            Factor
                              Variable
                                ID: b
                        ActParamMore
                          ,: ,
                          ActParamList
                            Exp
                              Term
                                Factor
                                  Variable
                                    ID: result
                  ): )
              StmMore
                ;: ;
                StmList
                  Stm
                    OutputStm
                      WRITE: write
                      (: (
                      Exp
                        Term
                          Factor
                            Variable
                              ID: result
                      ): )
    END: end
  .: .
